scope: Scope D — production bundle graduation (3-tier vocabulary demo/sample/production, D2 build script, D3 health tier + UI tier badge, D1 locale rename).

modes: template (fallback when credentials are missing; evidence records build_mode='template')
integrity_guarantees: validate_active_registry_integrity() must return [] before the bundle is written.
Atomic write via Path.replace() (writes to .tmp then renames).
SHA256 + byte size recorded alongside the bundle.

inference_rule.3_horizon_provenance: all real_derived* with no missing → production; any real_derived* → sample; else demo.

non_goals: No automatic promotion from sample → production. The graduation script must be invoked explicitly by an operator.
No LLM direct writes to the bundle. Promotion continues to ride harness-decide + harness-tick.
Tier change does not refresh a running server's active registry entries; operator must reload the bundle or restart the worker.
